CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Prove-Up Hrg
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Daniel R. Stern, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CHEOL HOON LEE and BUJA LEE.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) RANDY LEWIS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 are dismissed without prejudice.
Tony Lee sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $368,741.16
Pre-Judgment Interest: $20,076.45
Attorney's Fees: $3,500.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $392,317.61
Judgment signed in open court.
